text:
One year ago, we had nothing.

Todd broke his leg so badly he was airlifted. Five months without walking. I was surprise-laid off from my corporate job. We had a 10-month-old baby. We'd just moved to family land two weeks before the accident тАФ boxes still unpacked.

We started The Valley Clean Team with less than $5,000.

No bank loans. No investors. No safety net. Just the internet, our brains, and the will to make it work.

Today? We're projecting $250,000 in our first full calendar year. We have 13 incredible providers covering all of North Alabama. And we're just getting started.

If you're sitting on an idea and waiting for the "right time" тАФ this is your sign. There's no perfect time. Build the airplane while you fly it. тЬИя╕П

Thank you to everyone who has supported us this year тАФ our clients, our providers, our family, and our community. We couldn't have done this without you. ЁЯЩП

#ValleyCleanTeam #SmallBusiness #NorthAlabama #Entrepreneurship

Last Veterans Day, we gave away a free cleaning to honor a veteran in our community.

The response was incredible. Real stories from real families about heroes who served our country.

My father was a Vietnam veteran. When those men and women came home, they weren't welcomed тАФ they were spit on.

So whenever I see someone wearing a Vietnam veteran hat in Walmart, I don't say "thank you for your service." I say:

"Welcome home."

It's something many of them never heard. And it means more than you know.

We're proud to serve those who served us. ЁЯЗ║ЁЯЗ╕

#Veterans #GivingBack #Community #ValleyCleanTeam

Here's something most cleaning companies won't tell you:

Industry standard pay for house cleaners? $10/hour.

Our model? 50/50 split. Our providers consistently earn more than we do after expenses.

Why? Because cleaning is HARD. Go mop 5,000 square feet of hardwood floor and tell me it's not.

These are skilled professionals with attention to detail, time management, and heart. The fact that society doesn't value them the way they should doesn't mean WE won't.

When you book with The Valley Clean Team, you're supporting a company that puts its providers first. Every time. ЁЯТЪ

#ValleyCleanTeam #FairPay #SmallBusiness #NorthAlabama

Things that matter to us that you might not even think about:

тЬЕ We don't schedule residential cleans after a certain time тАФ we respect your evening
тЬЕ We never clean in the dark тАФ you can't clean what you can't see
тЬЕ We track arrival times so you're never left wondering "where are they?"
тЬЕ We're not the cable guy тАФ when we say 9 AM, we mean 9 AM
тЬЕ Every clean follows a consistent checklist from start to finish

Your home is your space. We treat it like ours. ЁЯПб

Book your clean today тЖТ thevalleycleanteam.com

#ValleyCleanTeam #HouseCleaning #NorthAlabama #TrustWorthy

Money can't buy you happiness.

But it CAN buy you time.

Time to go to the soccer game. Time to cook dinner without stress. Time to sit on the couch and breathe.

When a dad calls us and says "Please help my wife тАФ we both work full-time, we have four kids, and we just can't get the laundry done"тАж

That's not a cleaning job. That's giving a family their time back. тП░

You don't have to do it all. And you don't have to feel bad about asking for help.

ЁЯТЪ The Valley Clean Team тАФ Giving you back what matters most.

#ValleyCleanTeam #BuyTime #WorkingParents #NorthAlabama

"Deep clean" means something different to every person.

That's exactly why we built a detailed checklist into our booking process.

From the initial sale тЖТ to the walk-through тЖТ to every room in your home тЖТ to the final check-off.

Consistency is what built our business. Consistency is what will grow it.

When you book with us, you know exactly what you're getting. No surprises. No guesswork. Just a clean home, every single time. тЬЕ

Book now тЖТ thevalleycleanteam.com

#ValleyCleanTeam #DeepClean #Consistency #NorthAlabama

Hey mama. This one's for you. ЁЯл╢

I know you think you should be able to do it all. Keep the house spotless. Work full-time. Get the kids to practice. Make dinner. Be everything for everyone.

I'm a mom too. And I learned the hard way: you can do a lot of things, but you can't do ALL the things.

It's okay to ask for help. It's okay to come home to a clean house that someone else cleaned. It's okay to choose the soccer game over the mop.

You're not failing. You're prioritizing.

And that's exactly what makes you a great mom. ЁЯТЪ

тАФ Christen, co-owner of The Valley Clean Team

#ValleyCleanTeam #MomLife #WorkingMom #ItsOkay #NorthAlabama

People ask us: "How do you find good cleaners?"

The truth? Sometimes we BUILD them. ЁЯФи

We've developed an on-the-job training program where I (Christen) personally work alongside new providers. Side by side. Room by room.

Not everyone comes to us with professional cleaning experience. But if they have the right heart, we can teach the skills.

Because you can teach someone to clean a bathroom. You can't teach someone to care. тЭдя╕П

Interested in joining our team? Visit thevalleycleanteam.com

#ValleyCleanTeam #NowHiring #TeamBuilding #NorthAlabama

Fun fact about The Valley Clean Team:

Todd is an Alabama fan. ЁЯРШ
Christen is an Auburn fan. ЁЯРЕ

They call it a "mixed marriage" in Alabama. ЁЯШВ

But somehow they've managed to build a business together, raise a daughter, and only argue about footballтАж most of the time.

Happy Friday, North Alabama! Who are you rooting for this weekend? ЁЯПИ

#ValleyCleanTeam #FunFactFriday #Alabama #Auburn #MixedMarriage #NorthAlabama

ONE YEAR of The Valley Clean Team. ЁЯОЙ

To our very first customer тАФ thank you for taking a chance on us. (Yes, you're getting a free month of cleaning. You earned it.)

To our providers тАФ thank you for trusting us when we were brand new and unproven. You ARE this company.

To our families тАФ thank you for the garbage cans hauled to the road, the snacks delivered, the babysitting, and the endless support.

To our community тАФ thank you for choosing local. Thank you for your reviews, your referrals, and your kind words.

We started with nothing but a broken leg, a baby, and a dream. And you helped us build something real.

Here's to year two. We're just getting started. ЁЯЪА

#ValleyCleanTeam #OneYear #Anniversary #ThankYou #NorthAlabama

How We Built a $250K Business With Less Than $5,000

ЁЯПе August 2022: Todd breaks his leg. Airlifted. Can't walk for 5 months.
ЁЯС╢ October 2022: Christen is surprise-laid off. 10-month-old at home. Zero income.
ЁЯТб The Pivot: "All I had was time, a remote, and a brain." Found Cody Sanchez on YouTube. Researched boring businesses.
ЁЯЪА What $5K bought us: LLC registration, BookingKoala, Canva branding, domain, phone system.
ЁЯУИ Year One Results: $250K revenue, 13 providers, all of North Alabama covered.

There is no perfect time to start. Build the airplane while you fly it. тЬИя╕П

One year ago we had a broken leg, a baby, and zero dollars. Today we're a $250K cleaning business. This is the real story тАФ no sugarcoating, no guru advice, just two people who were forced to figure it out. The best time to start was yesterday. The second best time is now. ЁЯТЪ

#SmallBusiness #Entrepreneurship #CleaningBusiness #StartupStory #NorthAlabama #BuildTheAirplane #ValleyCleanTeam

Perfectionism is the enemy of progress. When we started our business, we couldn't afford a graphic designer, a copywriter, or a fancy website. So I opened Canva and made things myself. I wrote every word of copy on our website.

Was it perfect? No.
Did it work? Absolutely.

Stop waiting for everything to be "ready." Ship it. Learn. Improve. Repeat.

"Good enough is better than nothing. We'll fix it later."

#DoneIsBetterThanPerfect #SmallBusinessTips #Entrepreneurship #StartBeforeYoureReady #ValleyCleanTeam

A dad called us last week. Four kids. Both parents working full-time. He said: "Please help my wife. We just can't get it all done."

We didn't just clean their house. We gave them their evening back. Their weekend back. Their peace of mind back.

This is why we do what we do. Not for the revenue. For the stories like this one.

ЁЯТЪ The Valley Clean Team тАФ Because you deserve to come home and breathe.

DM us or visit the link in bio to book your first clean. You don't have to do it all. We promise.

#CleanHome #BusyFamily #WorkingParents #NorthAlabama #ValleyCleanTeam #HouseCleaningService

3 Red Flags When Hiring a Cleaning Service ЁЯЪй

тЭМ They give you a quote without asking about your home
тЭМ They offer a "1тАУ5 PM arrival window" (We show up at the time we book. Period.)
тЭМ They don't have a checklist or guarantee

Not all cleaning companies are created equal. Here's what to look for тАФ and what to run from. ЁЯПГтАНтЩАя╕П

At The Valley Clean Team, we use a detailed checklist on every single job. We show up on time. And we have a guarantee because we know we're going to deliver.

Are we perfect? No. But we're honest about it тАФ and we'll always make it right. ЁЯТЪ

#CleaningTips #HowToChoose #CleaningService #NorthAlabama #ValleyCleanTeam

He's Alabama. I'm Auburn. He's the extrovert. I'm the thinker. He talks to strangers in Walmart about cleaning. I strategize behind the scenes in mom groups.

We're both Type A. We're both driven. And yes тАФ we butt heads. A lot. ЁЯШВ

But that's what makes this partnership work. He sees problems from the front lines. I see them from the bird's-eye view. Together, we cover every angle.

Marriage is hard. Business is hard. Doing both together? Really hard. But also really, really worth it.

This is us. Unfiltered. Still figuring it out. Still grateful. ЁЯТЪ

#CouplesInBusiness #MarriedEntrepreneurs #SmallBusinessLife #RealTalk #ValleyCleanTeam

Before we started The Valley Clean Team, we spent 15+ years building businesses for OTHER people. Moving across the country. Missing dinners. Answering work calls at midnight.

When we finally started our own company, we made a promise:

тЖТ Pay people what they're worth
тЖТ Stop at 5 PM
тЖТ Say no to bad clients
тЖТ Put providers before profit
тЖТ Be honest тАФ even when it's hard

It's not perfect. But we can put our heads on the pillow at night knowing we did our best and treated people right.

That's our standard. That's our brand. ЁЯТЪ

"We took everything we hated about the corporate world and said: 'When we do this, we're going to do it differently.'"

#CompanyValues #BusinessEthics #PeopleFirst #CleaningBusiness #ValleyCleanTeam

Serving all of North Alabama тАФ Shoals, Huntsville, Decatur, and beyond.

#NowHiring #CleaningJobs #NorthAlabama #JoinOurTeam #ValleyCleanTeam #HouseCleanerJobs

One of our providers cleaned a home for a man with dementia. His house was so unsanitary that Social Services wouldn't let him come home from the hospital.

Pest control killed the bugs. But they don't clean up after. (Fun fact: most don't.)

So we went in. On our hands and knees. Through the aftermath.

The pay was minimal. But our provider came back and said six words that remind us why we do this:

"My heart is full for helping this man."

This business was never just about cleaning houses. It's about cleaning up lives. ЁЯТЪ

#ServingOthers #CommunityFirst #PurposeDriven #ValleyCleanTeam #NorthAlabama

My wife says I have "golden retriever energy." ЁЯРХ

I talk to EVERYONE. The guy at Walmart checkout. The lady in the clearance aisle. The paint aisle stranger whose ceiling vents tell me their restaurant needs a deep clean.

Saturday morning, our carpet cleaner couldn't get in because the key person didn't show. I was at Walmart. The checkout guy asked "how's your morning?"

Most people say "fine." I told him the whole story.

20 minutes later, he's asking about our business and telling me about his staffing problems.

Marketing isn't always ads and funnels. Sometimes it's just being a human who gives a real answer to "how are you?" ЁЯд╖

#NetworkingTips #GoldenRetrieverEnergy #SmallBusinessMarketing #BeHuman #ValleyCleanTeam

Running a cleaning business isn't glamorous. But it IS flexible. And that flexibility means I never miss dinner with my family. That's the real win.

тШАя╕П 8:00 AM тАФ Check the schedule on BookingKoala
ЁЯУ▒ 8:15 AM тАФ Review overnight messages with our VA
ЁЯУЮ 9:00 AM тАФ Tier 2 interviews with potential cleaners
ЁЯПа 10:30 AM тАФ Send provider on their way to first clean
ЁЯУК 12:00 PM тАФ Check KPIs and review reports
ЁЯдЭ 2:00 PM тАФ BNI networking meeting
ЁЯПб 5:00 PM тАФ Switch to Dad mode. Business is closed.
ЁЯСитАНЁЯСйтАНЁЯСз 5:02 PM тАФ If I'm late, I hear about it ЁЯШВ

#DayInTheLife #SmallBusinessOwner #CleaningBusiness #WorkLifeBalance #ValleyCleanTeam

In August 2022, I broke my leg so badly I was airlifted. Five months, zero weight-bearing.

Two weeks earlier, we'd just moved into our new home on raw family land. We still had unpacked boxes. My wife was working corporate marketing. We had a 10-month-old.

Then in October, my wife was "surprise-retired." Walked in the door with a severance package and a baby on her hip.

Here's what we had:
тЖТ Zero extra cash
тЖТ Zero bank loans
тЖТ Zero industry experience in cleaning
тЖТ Less than $5,000 total

Here's what we did:
тЖТ Incorporated an LLC
тЖТ Built a website on BookingKoala
тЖТ Used Canva for branding
тЖТ Our first customer came in December 2022

One year later: $250,000 in projected revenue. 13 providers. Covering all of North Alabama.

The lesson? There is no perfect time to start. We were literally forced to start.

And I'd tell anyone sitting on the couch right now with a broken leg, a layoff letter, or a mountain of excuses:

You have the internet. You have your brain. You have time. That's enough.

Build the airplane while you fly it. тЬИя╕П

#Entrepreneurship #SmallBusiness #StartupStory #Resilience #CleaningBusiness

We turned down a massive corporate account last month.

Not because we couldn't do the work. Because of a contract clause.

They wanted us to sign a general building contractor agreement тАФ making us responsible for things like air filters and porch screens that had nothing to do with our cleaning scope.

The contract was non-negotiable.

So we said no.

Here's what I've learned after running businesses for 15+ years:

тЖТ Every contract is negotiable. If it's not, that's a red flag.
тЖТ If a client is inflexible before you start, they'll be a nightmare within 60 days.
тЖТ Revenue that costs you your integrity isn't revenue тАФ it's a liability.

We don't chase every dollar. We identify the RIGHT clients тАФ partners who respect boundaries, communicate clearly, and value quality.

Sometimes the most profitable word in business is "No."

#BusinessBoundaries #ClientManagement #Entrepreneurship #QualityOverQuantity

When we started The Valley Clean Team, I expected the hardest part to be finding clients.

It wasn't.

The hardest part was getting our providers to trust us.

They'd come from companies paying $10/hour. No schedule control. No say in which jobs they took. Completely devalued.

So when we told them we do a 50/50 split, that they control their schedule, and that we'd handle all the "boring stuff" тАФ marketing, scheduling, client disputesтАж

They didn't believe us.

We had to earn that trust. Week by week. Paycheck by paycheck.

Now our providers make more than we do after expenses. And we're okay with that. Because without them, there is no Valley Clean Team.

One of our cleaners recently helped a man with dementia whose home was so unsanitary he couldn't be discharged from the hospital. The pay was minimal. But she came back and said:

"My heart is full for helping this man."

That's what happens when you build a company that values its people.

тЖТ Pay them what they're worth
тЖТ Protect their time and safety
тЖТ Listen to their feedback
тЖТ Let them do what they love

They don't work FOR us. They work WITH us.

#Leadership #PeopleFirst #SmallBusiness #CompanyCulture

The social media gurus will tell you to "grind until you bleed."

We tried that version of success. It broke us.

Not financially. Physically. Emotionally. Relationally.

Now we live by a different philosophy: 1% better every day.

тЖТ We went from 28 Google reviews to 36 in two weeks
тЖТ We didn't dump $10K into a marketing campaign тАФ we trained our team to ask
тЖТ We don't measure success by month-over-month revenue spikes тАФ we measure lead inputs daily

The "hustle culture" influencers won't tell you this, but:

Willpower can be infinite. Time is not.

You can work 18-hour days and still not move the needle if you're working on the wrong things.

Or you can work 8тАУ5, delegate to trusted people, go home, cook fish tacos with your family, and build something sustainable.

We choose sustainable. Every single day.

#HustleCulture #WorkLifeBalance #Leadership #1PercentBetter

The best sales strategy I've ever used costs $0.

I just listen.

When someone calls asking "how much does it cost?" тАФ I don't answer. Not in the first 10 seconds.

Because there's always a story:
- "My dad died and we need to clean the house for the wake."
- "We have four kids and both work full-time and we just can't get the laundry done."
- "I just moved and I need help."

If you LISTEN, you don't have to ask awkward qualifying questions. The answers are already there.

тЖТ If they mention moving тЖТ "That sounds perfect for our move-in/move-out package."
тЖТ If they mention a recurring struggle тЖТ "Let's set you up on a regular schedule."
тЖТ If they sound overwhelmed тЖТ "That's exactly why we exist."

The best salespeople aren't talkers. They're listeners who know when to offer the right solution at the right moment.

Stop pitching. Start listening.

#SalesTips #CustomerExperience #SmallBusiness #Entrepreneurship
